message:
fix: clarify console-submitted vs GitHub-authored bug counts (#8896)

The Rewards panel's "Reports: N" line counts bugs submitted through this
console (sourced from local reward events), while the Feedback → Updates
tab's "X Bugs" badge counts every bug-labeled GitHub issue the user
authored across our orgs (kubestellar, llm-d). These are intentionally
different populations, but the labels made them look like one
inconsistent metric.

Relabel the Rewards panel rows to "Submitted via console: N" and add
mutually-explanatory tooltips on both surfaces so users can see why the
numbers differ at a glance. Also drops in source comments pointing at
this issue so future readers don't try to "reconcile" the counts.

Fixes #8893

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -785,6 +785,10 @@ function GitHubContributionsSection({ {githubRewards && githubRewards.breakdown && ( + // These badges count every issue/PR you authored across our orgs + // (kubestellar, llm-d) — NOT only items submitted via this console. + // The Rewards panel's "Submitted via console" line counts a different + // (smaller) population. See kubestellar/console#8893 for context.
{githubRewards.breakdown.prs_merged > 0 && ( @@ -798,12 +802,24 @@ function GitHubContributionsSection({ )} {githubRewards.breakdown.bug_issues > 0 && ( - }> + } + title="All bug-labeled GitHub issues you authored across our orgs. The Rewards panel's 'Report Bugs' counter only includes bugs submitted through this console and will be smaller." + > {githubRewards.breakdown.bug_issues} Bugs )} {githubRewards.breakdown.feature_issues > 0 && ( - }> + } + title="All feature-labeled GitHub issues you authored across our orgs. The Rewards panel's 'Suggest Features' counter only includes features submitted through this console and will be smaller." + > {githubRewards.breakdown.feature_issues} Features )}

@@ -98,7 +98,16 @@ export function RewardsPanel() { {/* LinkedIn Share */} - {/* Bug Reports */} + {/* + Bug Reports / Feature Suggestions cards intentionally show + console-submitted counts only (sourced from local reward events). + This is NOT the same population as the "X Bugs" badge in the + Feedback → Updates tab, which counts every bug-labeled GitHub + issue authored by the user across our orgs (kubestellar, llm-d). + Tracked: kubestellar/console#8893 — the labels and tooltips + below make the distinction explicit so the two numbers no + longer look like a data inconsistency. + */}
@@ -112,8 +121,11 @@ export function RewardsPanel() {

Found a bug? Report it on GitHub to earn coins!

-

- Reports: {getActionCount('bug_report')} +

+ Submitted via console: {getActionCount('bug_report')}

@@ -133,8 +145,11 @@ export function RewardsPanel() {

Have an idea? Submit feature requests to earn coins!

-

- Suggestions: {getActionCount('feature_suggestion')} +

+ Submitted via console: {getActionCount('feature_suggestion')}
